svg.title: Godot 4 Forward+ Frame Execution — One Frame, Top to Bottom
svg.desc: Sequential diagram of every render pass executed per frame in RenderForwardClustered
svg.text: Forward+ frame — every pass, in order

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens in the depth pre-pass in Godot 4 and why is it done first?')
sendPrompt('Explain frustum culling and occlusion culling in Godot 4 RendererSceneCull')
sendPrompt('How does the shadow atlas and shadow map rendering work in Godot 4 Forward+?')
sendPrompt('What is GI probe and SDFGI update pass in Godot 4 rendering?')
g.text: gi.cpp → voxel cascade updates, SH probes

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the light cluster building pass in Godot 4 Forward+ clustered renderer?')
sendPrompt('Explain the depth pre-pass in Godot 4 Forward+ and how it improves overdraw performance')
sendPrompt('How does the main color pass work in Godot 4 Forward+ with PBR lighting and clustered lights?')
sendPrompt('How does the transparent pass work in Godot 4 and how is alpha blending handled?')
g.text: back-to-front sort → blend over HDR buffer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does SSAO and SSIL work in Godot 4? What are the sample counts and quality settings?')
sendPrompt('How does Screen Space Reflections SSR work in Godot 4?')
sendPrompt('How does volumetric fog rendering work in Godot 4?')
sendPrompt('How does glow and bloom work in Godot 4? What is the blur pyramid algorithm?')
sendPrompt('How does depth of field (DOF) blur work in Godot 4?')
sendPrompt('What is TAA temporal anti-aliasing in Godot 4 and how does it reduce flickering?')
sendPrompt('How does tone mapping work in Godot 4? What tone map operators are available?')
sendPrompt('How does FSR2 upscaling work in Godot 4 and how do I tune it for quality?')
sendPrompt('How does the 2D canvas rendering pass work after 3D in Godot 4?')
sendPrompt('How does Godot 4 blit the final rendered frame to the swapchain and screen?')

svg.text: Click any pass to explore it — each maps to a specific source file
